heading: Use of counternarcotics enforcement activities in certain employee performance appraisals
label: 413 Use of counternarcotics enforcement activities in certain employee performance appraisals
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b)(1)(A), was redesignated by , , .Section 1701(7) of title 21section 1701(11) of title 21Pub. L. 115–271, title VIII, § 8216(4)132 Stat. 4117Oct. 24, 2018
amendments: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b)(1)(A), was redesignated by , , .Section 1701(7) of title 21section 1701(11) of title 21Pub. L. 115–271, title VIII, § 8216(4)132 Stat. 4117Oct. 24, 2018

children.text: the contribution of that employee to seizures of narcotics and arrests of violators of Federal, State, or local narcotics laws; and

the degree to which that employee cooperated with or contributed to the efforts of other employees, either within the Department or other Federal, State, or local agencies, in counternarcotics enforcement.

children.label: A
children.text: a National Drug Control Program Agency , as defined in section 1701(7) of title 21 (as last in effect); and12So in original. Probably should be “agency”.1See References in Text note below.2

children.label: i
children.text: the counternarcotics officer, appointed under ; orsection 458 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: if applicable, the counternarcotics officer’s successor in function (as determined by the Secretary); and
the term “performance appraisal system” means a system under which periodic appraisals of job performance of employees are made, whether under chapter 43 of title 5, or otherwise.
